text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day during the holidays, Symboli Rudolf asks
me to come to the cafeteria.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Grass, look! They brought out more cakes!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Really, Spe, that's your fourth one. I think you've
had enough already...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But look at the name! It's called Premium Matcha
Cake! It looks sooo good!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Premium... Matcha...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Well, I suppose we could take a look...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yay! Ehehe, it really is the most wonderful time of
the year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The cafeteria is crowded with Umamusume. As I
try to make my way through...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Trainer! There you are. Welcome to the
student council holiday party.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Naturally. We do this every year. Public events
are an excellent way of raising student morale.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: And logistical justifications aside, it would be a bit of a shame not to celebrate the holidays in some way, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Attendance is voluntary, and students are free to
come and go as they please. We usually see
participation rates of around fifty percent...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But this year, attendance has exceeded ninety
percent. Which is to say, nearly the entire student
body is present.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As one of the organizers, I can't deny it's
flattering, but at the same time, we didn't plan
for this many attendees.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The entire student council is running itself ragged
trying to cater to them all.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I hate to invite you here only to abandon you, but
it seems you may have to enjoy the party on your
own.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I planned to show you around myself, but I doubt
I'll have the chance.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
My apologies. But at the very least, I'm confident
that you'll enjoy the festivities.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Now, if that's all...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, President! I'm sorry to interrupt, but...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
We... we wanted to ask, um... Could you take a
picture with us?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: A photo? Of course.

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Thank you! You're the best!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
We're so sorry for interrupting you, Trainer, but
we thought this might be our only chance!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
The President looked so at ease when she was
talking with you...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I am an open book, it seems. My dignity is in shambles...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I mustn't let the camera capture my
embarrassment. Speaking of which...
choice_data_list: Want me to take the photo?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If you would be so kind. Do try to get our best
sides.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Wait! Um... President, could you stand in the
middle? With your arms crossed?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: If you wish, but... why?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
You need to really look like the Emperor! I want
to capture you at your coolest!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Very well. If that's what you want...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Then how about this?

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Eeeeek! That's so awesome!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I have other poses too, you know.

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Kyaaaaa! Sh-she's so... imperial!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha... I think I could get used to this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This holiday party turns out to be a fun
opportunity to see Rudolf cut loose a little.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Good grief. I knew I was right to seek you out.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Pardon?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You've been working since this morning. You
must be exhausted. Why don't you get some fresh
air?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Surely the same goes for you? You had just as
early a start as I did.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I took a break earlier in the afternoon, as per your imperial decree. Or have you forgotten?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Well... I suppose that's true, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
No buts. I've already told the rest of the student
council that you're indisposed.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It would only cause confusion if I were to change
the story now. Are you certain that's wise?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Is it just me, or have you gotten less
compromising recently? But very well. You've
made it clear I have no choice.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, Trainer, it seems I can either leave of my
own volition or be chased out.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And seeing as I would prefer to leave with my
dignity intact... would you come with me for a
moment?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Look, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We can see the entire academy from up here. Of
course, this late in the day, it's all dark...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Except for the lights of the cafeteria. It's
beautiful, don't you think? The way it shines in
the darkness.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Every student of Tracen Academy is their own
glimmer of light, and when they come together,
they are radiant indeed.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's my place to do everything I can to help them
shine brighter.
choice_data_list: And it's my job to help you shine brighter.
And it's my job to help you shine brighter.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oho?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, aren't you confident. I hope you can live up
to those words.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That aside...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Do I hear music in the air? That must be the start
of the dance.
choice_data_list: Are you sure? I don't hear anything.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We Umamusume have better hearing than
humans, so that's only to be expected.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I really don't hear anything... but if she says so,
then it must be true.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, we won't make it back before this song
ends. In which case...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What do you say we have our own dance right
here?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Nervous, are you? Don't underestimate your
dance partner.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: The Emperor will take the lead.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Unless you're getting cold feet?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I am pleased to hear it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Well, then. May I have this dance?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grip...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now turn here, and... Oho? You're rather good at
this.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha. I may have found myself the perfect dance
partner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us enjoy our private holiday ball for a
while, until Symboli Rudolf has finally danced her
fill.
